channel.title: Xen on Anekoique's Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Xen on Anekoique's Blog

item.title: Virtualization Systems — Xen
item.description: Canonical paravirtualizing Type-1 hypervisor. PV/HVM/PVH modes contrasted side by side across CPU, memory, I/O, cross-domain communication, and VM management. The disaggregated shape in production form.
